calculatorPage.title: Smart heating system calculation
calculatorPage.description: Enter your room parameters to estimate required boiler output and an approximate budget.
calculatorPage.budgetNote: * Includes an approximate cost of radiators, pipes, fittings, and related installation materials based on area (excluding boiler cost).

cartPage.title: Shopping cart
cartPage.name: Name
cartPage.note: The order will open in WhatsApp. No registration required.

installationPage.title: Professional heating system installation in Bishkek
installationPage.description: We install boilers, radiators, underfloor heating, and pipe routing with warranty, clear estimates, and system startup.

boilers.title: Boiler installation
boilers.description: Gas, solid-fuel, and electric boilers with proper piping and connection.

radiators.title: Radiator installation
radiators.description: Placement selection, neat mounting, connection, and leak testing.

floor.title: Hydronic underfloor heating
floor.description: Manifolds, pipes, loops, and adjustment for even room heating.

pipes.title: Design and pipe routing
pipes.description: Clear layout, material estimate, and routing for your building specifics.

installationPage.formDescription: Leave your contacts and briefly describe the site. We will clarify details, advise on equipment, and prepare a preliminary estimate.
installationPage.messagePlaceholder: Example: 120 m² house, boiler and radiator installation needed
installationPage.success: Request sent! We will contact you.
installationPage.error: Could not send request. Please try again.

heatingCategories.title: Heating Categories
heatingCategories.description: Core heating equipment sections: boilers, radiators, and underfloor heating. Each category is selected by output, working pressure, and installation profile.

boilers.title: Boilers
boilers.summary: Gas, electric, and solid-fuel boilers selected for the real heat loss of the property.

radiators.title: Radiators
radiators.summary: Panel, vertical, and designer radiators with verified heat output and working pressure.

underfloor.title: Underfloor Heating
underfloor.summary: Manifolds, pipes, thermostats, and components for complete underfloor heating systems.

proof.title: Installed, certified, documented.
proof.certificatesText: We provide certificates, equipment passports, and manufacturer warranty documents.
proof.projectChecksText: Before delivery, we review the area, insulation, pipe routing, and domestic hot water demand.

contacts.title: Heating Center Contacts
contacts.description: We will help you choose equipment, check availability, and prepare a request for your heating project.

form.name: Name
form.success: Request sent successfully! We will contact you.
form.error: Could not send the request. Please try again.

hero.title: Engineered comfort for your home
hero.description: We select boilers, radiators, and underfloor heating systems, calculate required output, and provide professional installation with warranty.

calculator.note: The estimate is based on 100 W per m2 with reserve output for peak winter loads.

homeProducts.title: Popular Equipment
homeProducts.description: Proven boilers, radiators, and underfloor heating kits with clear specifications, warehouse availability, and quick cart add.

vaillantGasBoiler.name: Gas boiler
vaillantGasBoiler.description: Wall-mounted gas boiler for stable home heating.

prothermElectricBoiler.name: Electric boiler
prothermElectricBoiler.description: Electric boiler for main or backup heating.

royalThermoRadiator.name: Heating radiator
royalThermoRadiator.description: Radiator with high heat output and a clean design.

heatPumpPremium.name: Heat pump
heatPumpPremium.description: Energy-efficient pump for modern heating and domestic hot water.

underfloorHeatingKit.name: Underfloor heating kit
underfloorHeatingKit.description: Ready-made hydronic underfloor heating kit with pipe, manifold, and controls.

footer.description: Professional heating equipment in Bishkek. More than 10 years in the market.

hero.title: About Heating Center
hero.description: For more than 10 years, we have helped customers choose reliable heating systems, equip projects with the right products, and provide service support after purchase.

mission.title: Making professional heating clear and accessible
mission.text: We believe a reliable heating system starts not with a box of equipment, but with proper selection. Our approach is simple: understand the customer's task, offer an honest technical solution, and provide support when it is truly needed.
mission.imageAlt: Heating system equipment at Heating Center

assortment.title: A wide selection of equipment from an official distributor
assortment.text: We stock boilers, radiators, pump groups, automation, components, and underfloor heating solutions. As an official distributor, we provide original products, transparent warranty terms, and confidence in delivery timelines.
assortment.imageAlt: Heating equipment warehouse and store at Heating Center

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: We work with proven brands and equipment that can handle real operating loads.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.text: We select solutions based on the property, budget, and future service needs.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.text: We consult, complete orders, and support customers at every stage of the project.
